input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8771 [Automation] javac compile fails for org.apache.maven:maven-core:2.0.7; label=fails-javac-compile; body_chars=8015

risks: The reported javac failure is caused by generated tests using outdated maven-artifact exception constructors; tests must target the 2.0.7 API signatures, but this is a test-code correction rather than deterministic setup.

Full Maven goal execution can involve local/remote repository state and plugin resolution, so generated tests should prefer self-contained APIs or CLI modes such as help/version unless local temp-project setup is explicitly authored.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: No extra dependency, Docker image, environment variable, or system property is concretely required before meaningful maven-core 2.0.7 coverage is reachable; the resolved artifact brings its Maven 2 runtime modules, Plexus, ClassWorlds, and Wagon providers transitively, and existing meaningful tests can exercise CLI/help/version, diagnosers, lifecycle/plugin helpers, and metadata-backed resources without external services.
